name: What happens if I recover faster than expected and return to work?
description: Benefits stop when you return to full duty at same or higher pay. Any overpayment may need repayment, but early recovery doesn't hurt future claims.

mainEntity.name: What happens if I recover faster than expected and return to work?

acceptedAnswer.text: Benefits stop when you return to full duty at same or higher pay. Any overpayment may need repayment, but early recovery doesn't hurt future claims.
